ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roads" (
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road */,
  "road_type" INTEGER /* Type of the road (e.g., residential, arterial) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the road is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the road */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the road */,
  "road_length" REAL /* Length of the road in kilometers or miles */,
  "road_width" REAL /* Width of the road in meters or feet */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of road surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit of the road */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the road was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the road data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roads_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roads_road_type FOREIGN KEY ("road_type") REFERENCES road_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers or square miles */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the road type (e.g., residential, arterial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the road type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data record */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road for which traffic data is collected */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the traffic data was collected */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Count of vehicles recorded */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles on the road */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Total traffic volume on the road */,
  "peak_hour_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_hour_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume during off-peak hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_priority" TEXT /* Priority of maintenance (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the road data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the road data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the road data (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road for which the condition is recorded */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date of the condition assessment */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the road condition */,
  "condition_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the road condition (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "condition_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the road condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, traffic analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road related to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "report_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the report (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., city planner, traffic analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
